{
  "generation": 1,
  "nodes": 14,
  "status": "ok",
  "text": "func CreateNewAccountCli(t testing.TB, loginName string) (string, string) {
n1: 	c, err := loadConfig()
n2: 	require.NoError(t, err)

n3: 	ctx := context.Background()
n4: 	password, err := base62.Random(16)
n5: 	require.NoError(t, err)
n6: 	output := e2e.RunCommand(ctx, "boundary",
		e2e.WithArgs(
			"accounts", "create", "password",
			"-auth-method-id", c.AuthMethodId,
			"-login-name", loginName,
			"-password", "env://E2E_TEST_ACCOUNT_PASSWORD",
			"-name", "e2e Account "+loginName,
			"-description", "e2e Account",
			"-format", "json",
		),
		e2e.WithEnv("E2E_TEST_ACCOUNT_PASSWORD", password),
	)
n7: 	require.NoError(t, output.Err, string(output.Stderr))

n8: 	var newAccountResult accounts.AccountCreateResult
n9: 	err = json.Unmarshal(output.Stdout, &newAccountResult)
n10: 	require.NoError(t, err)

n11: 	newAccountId := newAccountResult.Item.Id
n12: 	t.Cleanup(func() {
		AuthenticateAdminCli(t)
		output := e2e.RunCommand(ctx, "boundary",
			e2e.WithArgs("accounts", "delete", "-id", newAccountId),
		)
		require.NoError(t, output.Err, string(output.Stderr))
	})

n13: 	t.Logf("Created Account: %s", newAccountId)

n14: 	return newAccountId, password
}
"
}

  "symbol": "github.com/hashicorp/boundary/testing/internal/e2e/boundary.CreateNewOrgCli",
  "view": {
    "generation": 10,
    "nodes": 9,
    "text": "func CreateNewOrgCli(t testing.TB, ctx context.Context) string {
n1: 	output := e2e.RunCommand(ctx, "boundary",
		e2e.WithArgs(
			"scopes", "create",
			"-name", "e2e Org",
			"-scope-id", "global",
			"-format", "json",
		),
	)
n2: 	require.NoError(t, output.Err, string(output.Stderr))

n3: 	var newOrgResult scopes.ScopeCreateResult
n4: 	err := json.Unmarshal(output.Stdout, &newOrgResult)
n5: 	require.NoError(t, err)

n6: 	newOrgId := newOrgResult.Item.Id
n7: 	t.Cleanup(func() {
		AuthenticateAdminCli(t, context.Background())
		output := e2e.RunCommand(ctx, "boundary",
			e2e.WithArgs("scopes", "delete", "-id", newOrgId),
		)
		require.NoError(t, output.Err, string(output.Stderr))
	})

n8: 	t.Logf("Created Org Id: %s", newOrgId)
n9: 	return newOrgId
}
"
  }
}

    "text": "func CreateNewTargetCli(t testing.TB, projectId string, defaultPort string, ctx context.Context) string {\nn1: \toutput := e2e.RunCommand(context.Background(), \"boundary\",\n\t\te2e.WithArgs(\n\t\t\t\"targets\", \"create\", \"tcp\",\n\t\t\t\"-scope-id\", projectId,\n\t\t\t\"-default-port\", defaultPort,\n\t\t\t\"-name\", \"e2e Target\",\n\t\t\t\"-format\", \"json\",\n\t\t),\n\t)\nn2: \trequire.NoError(t, output.Err, string(output.Stderr))\nn3: \tvar newTargetResult targets.TargetCreateResult\nn4: \terr := json.Unmarshal(output.Stdout, \u0026newTargetResult)\nn5: \trequire.NoError(t, err)\nn6: \tnewTargetId := newTargetResult.Item.Id\nn7: \tt.Logf(\"Created Target: %s\", newTargetId)\n\nn8: \treturn newTargetId\n}\n"
